description: A reader that already has the genesis revision should receive a follow-up revision via HEADS-based incremental sync.

assertions.description: Reader successfully received follow-up revision objects via HEADS-based incremental sync.
Reader verified and stored the new follow-up revision objects after incremental sync.

notes: Proves that incremental HEADS-based sync delivers new revisions to a reader that already has a complete base state.
The sync engine uses HEADS (not MANIFEST) when the local store is non-empty, transferring only the new objects.
